name: Berghain Bouncer
description: A heavily tattooed man in black who arbitrarily decides if you are cool enough to enter the club.
toneOfVoice: Intimidating, silent, speaks in single-word rejections.

name: Rejected Clubber
description: Someone who queued for three hours in the freezing cold just to be told 'not today'.
toneOfVoice: Bitter, overly defensive, claims they didn't want to go in anyway.

name: Tuesday Morning Raver
description: A techno enthusiast who hasn't slept since Friday and is still wearing sunglasses indoors.
toneOfVoice: Exhausted, overly profound, jaw clenching slightly.

name: Späti Owner
description: The guy running the corner shop who has seen everything and judges your 3 AM snack choices.
toneOfVoice: Unfazed, transactional, calls everyone 'Chef'.

name: Späti Cat
description: A lethargic feline sleeping directly on the only chips you wanted to buy.
toneOfVoice: Indifferent, refuses to move, purrs aggressively.

name: BVG Kontrolleur
description: An undercover transit officer who shows no mercy to tourists who forgot to stamp their tickets.
toneOfVoice: Authoritative, zero empathy, demands to see your ID.

name: BVG Bus Driver
description: A driver who actively enjoys closing the doors just as someone runs up to them.
toneOfVoice: Berliner Schnauze, cynical, yells at cyclists.

name: English-Only Expat
description: Someone who has lived in Berlin for five years but only knows how to say 'genau' and 'Tschüss'.
toneOfVoice: Confused, entitled, constantly asking if people speak English.

name: Crypto Startup Bro
description: A guy in Mitte wearing a Patagonia vest, pitching a blockchain app nobody needs.
toneOfVoice: Buzzword-heavy, overly enthusiastic, mentions synergy.

name: Third-Wave Barista
description: A coffee snob who is deeply offended if you ask for cow's milk or sugar.
toneOfVoice: Condescending, explains roast profiles, sighs heavily.

name: Döner Chef
description: The hardest working man in the city who prepares a flawless sandwich in 30 seconds.
toneOfVoice: Friendly, asks 'mit scharf?', calls you 'Chef' or 'Meister'.

name: Desperate Flat Hunter
description: Someone treating an apartment viewing with 200 other people like a life-or-death audition.
toneOfVoice: Desperate, over-prepared, offering bribes.

name: WG Casting Judge
description: A flatmate who conducts a two-hour interview to decide if your vibes are right for their kitchen.
toneOfVoice: Judging, asks weird psychological questions, vegan-focused.

name: Prenzlauer Berg Mom
description: A wealthy mother pushing an incredibly expensive, massive stroller through a tiny cafe.
toneOfVoice: Entitled, passive-aggressive, protective of her organic spelt bread.

name: Aggressive Cyclist
description: A commuter on a racing bike who treats the bike lane like the Tour de France.
toneOfVoice: Ringing bell furiously, yelling traffic laws.

name: E-Scooter Tourist
description: Someone riding an electric scooter on the sidewalk while looking at Google Maps.
toneOfVoice: Lost, unapologetic, moving erratically.

name: Bürgeramt Clerk
description: A city official who will reject your life-saving paperwork because it lacks a specific blue stamp.
toneOfVoice: Strict, bureaucratic, speaks only rapid, complex German.

name: Club Mate Addict
description: A programmer or DJ whose bloodstream is currently 80% caffeinated iced tea.
toneOfVoice: Jittery, holding a glass bottle, hacking loudly.

name: Mauerpark Karaoke Singer
description: Someone destroying an Oasis song in front of 3,000 strangers on a Sunday afternoon.
toneOfVoice: Off-key, overly confident, loving the applause.

name: Flea Market Vendor
description: A seller demanding 50 euros for a completely broken Soviet-era film camera.
toneOfVoice: Stubborn, claiming things are 'vintage', smoking rolled cigarettes.

name: Gentrifying Swabian
description: A wealthy transplant who moved to the gritty city and now complains that it's too noisy.
toneOfVoice: Complaining, wants things tidy (Kehrwoche), wealthy.

name: Tempelhof Kite Surfer
description: Someone rolling around an abandoned airport runway on a skateboard pulled by a giant kite.
toneOfVoice: Chilled out, wind-blown, loves vast empty spaces.

name: U-Bahn Musician
description: An accordion player stepping onto the train to play 'Despacito' louder than is comfortable.
toneOfVoice: Loud, persistent, shaking a paper cup.

name: U-Bahn Pigeon
description: A bird that rides the subway three stops instead of flying.
toneOfVoice: Cooing, walking around people's feet, lazy.

name: Kreuzberg Fox
description: A shockingly bold fox crossing the street like a normal pedestrian at 2 AM.
toneOfVoice: Silent, scavenging, completely unafraid of humans.

name: Hausmeister
description: The building caretaker who posts angry, passive-aggressive notes in the hallway about recycling.
toneOfVoice: Gruff, rule-obsessed, watching from the window.

name: All-Black Fashionista
description: Someone wearing extremely expensive, poorly fitted black clothing to look 'underground'.
toneOfVoice: Apathetic, chainsmoking, judgmental of colors.

name: Flaschensammler
description: A polite but fast-moving person collecting empty beer bottles from groups in the park.
toneOfVoice: Polite, asking 'darf ich?', shaking a bag of glass.

name: Pfandautomat
description: A bottle return machine that constantly beeps and refuses perfectly good bottles.
toneOfVoice: Beeping aggressively, rejecting bottles, flashing red lights.

name: Aspiring DJ
description: A guy who tells everyone he's a DJ but actually just has a really long Spotify playlist.
toneOfVoice: Bragging, handing out Soundcloud links, defensive.

name: Vegan Currywurst Advocate
description: Someone aggressively explaining how seitan is actually better than real sausage.
toneOfVoice: Preachy, chewing loudly, highly ethical.

name: Aging Kreuzberg Punk
description: A leather-clad rebel holding a dog on a rope, furious about gentrification.
toneOfVoice: Anti-capitalist, nostalgic for the 80s, drinking Sternburg.

name: Sternburg Connoisseur
description: A guy who refuses to drink anything other than the cheapest beer available.
toneOfVoice: Frugal, burping, defending his bad taste.

name: DHL Driver
description: A driver who rings your bell once and immediately drives away to drop your package 3km away.
toneOfVoice: Rushed, leaving 'we missed you' notes, sprinting.

name: Package Hunter
description: A neighbor knocking on five different doors trying to find a package left 'with a neighbor'.
toneOfVoice: Frustrated, holding a slip of paper, apologizing.

name: Vintage Clothes Snob
description: Someone who just paid 80 euros for a stained track jacket from 1994.
toneOfVoice: Proud, claiming it's 'authentic', adjusting oversized glasses.

name: Bouldering Bro
description: A guy whose entire personality is climbing small indoor walls without ropes.
toneOfVoice: Chalky, talking about 'crimps' and 'routes', shirtless.

name: Neukölln Yoga Instructor
description: A deeply spiritual teacher who charges 40 euros an hour and drinks matcha.
toneOfVoice: Soothing, pseudo-spiritual, breathing deeply.

name: Red Light Waiter
description: A German pedestrian standing at a red crosswalk light at 3 AM with zero cars in sight.
toneOfVoice: Law-abiding, glaring at jaywalkers, perfectly still.

name: Jaywalking Tourist
description: Someone crossing the street on red and being yelled at by elderly locals.
toneOfVoice: Confused, rushing, ignoring rules.

name: History Tour Guide
description: Someone holding an umbrella in the air, yelling about the Cold War to 20 bored teenagers.
toneOfVoice: Loud, reciting facts, pointing at concrete.

name: Lost Tourist at Alex
description: A person staring helplessly at the TV Tower trying to figure out which S-Bahn to take.
toneOfVoice: Overwhelmed, reading a map upside down, stressed.

name: Ringbahn Sleeper
description: Someone who has been riding the circular train loop asleep for four continuous hours.
toneOfVoice: Snoring softly, leaning on a window.

name: U-Bahn Sofa Mover
description: A person trying to aggressively cram a 3-seater couch onto a crowded rush hour train.
toneOfVoice: Sweating, shouting 'Achtung!', totally unreasonable.

name: Couch Subletter
description: Someone illegally renting out half a mattress in a living room for 600 euros a month.
toneOfVoice: Shady, calling it a 'cozy urban space', avoiding the landlord.

name: Winter Depressed Local
description: A local who hasn't seen the sun since October and is surviving purely on vitamin D pills.
toneOfVoice: Pale, miserable, complaining about the gray sky.

name: Summer Berlin Enthusiast
description: A local who completely forgets how bad winter is because they are drinking by a canal.
toneOfVoice: Euphoric, sunburned, refusing to go indoors.

name: Inflatable Boat Captain
description: Someone floating down the Landwehrkanal in a cheap rubber dinghy drinking wine.
toneOfVoice: Relaxed, shouting at swans, drifting slowly.

name: Landwehrkanal Swan
description: A massive white bird that will absolutely attack you if you drop your bread.
toneOfVoice: Hissing aggressively, flapping wings, territorial.

name: Photoautomat
description: An aging, sentient black-and-white photo booth that takes 10 minutes to print wet photos.
toneOfVoice: Whirring, flashing bright lights, smelling like chemicals.

name: Record Store Elitist
description: A vinyl shop employee who judges you intensely for buying a pop record.
toneOfVoice: Sighing, rolling eyes, organizing vinyl.

name: Open-Air Raver
description: Someone stomping in the dust of an abandoned factory on a Sunday afternoon.
toneOfVoice: Dusty, smiling, nodding to a bassline.

name: Tempelhof Roller Skater
description: Someone doing elaborate dance routines on quad skates to disco music in the park.
toneOfVoice: Upbeat, gliding smoothly, listening to headphones.

name: Aggressive Bakery Cashier
description: A woman who demands you order your Brötchen in exactly two seconds or step aside.
toneOfVoice: Rapid-fire German, impatient, counting coins angrily.

name: Half-Empty Berliner Pilsner
description: A forgotten bottle of beer sitting on a bridge, waiting to be claimed.
toneOfVoice: Lukewarm, abandoned, slightly flat.

name: Coworking Space Manager
description: Someone enforcing the 'quiet zone' rules while hosting a ping-pong tournament.
toneOfVoice: Corporate casual, offering free fruit water.

name: Cafe Remote Worker
description: A freelancer buying one coffee and occupying a four-person table with their laptop for six hours.
toneOfVoice: Typing loudly, asking for the WiFi password, ignoring glares.

name: Cash Only Sign
description: A stubborn piece of cardboard defending a restaurant from the modern banking system.
toneOfVoice: Rigid, uncompromising, 'Nur Bares ist Wahres'.

name: Euronet ATM
description: A bright yellow cash machine trying to charge you an insane fee for withdrawing 20 euros.
toneOfVoice: Predatory, flashing neon, asking for terrible exchange rates.

name: Stressed Visa Applicant
description: An expat clutching a massive folder of documents, praying the immigration office accepts them.
toneOfVoice: Panicked, over-polite, sweating through their shirt.

name: Steuerberater
description: A highly paid professional who still asks you to fax them your receipts.
toneOfVoice: Dry, obsessed with folders, refusing emails.

name: Midnight Tagger
description: A masked youth risking their life to spray paint an illegible word on a train.
toneOfVoice: Secretive, shaking spray cans, running fast.

name: Street Art Guide
description: Someone explaining the deep societal meaning of a tag that just says 'POOP'.
toneOfVoice: Pretentious, pointing at walls, wearing a beanie.

name: Outdoor Ping Pong Hustler
description: A guy at the park table with his own professional paddle who destroys casual players.
toneOfVoice: Competitive, spinning the ball, drinking beer while playing.

name: Spikeball Enthusiast
description: A guy diving into the dirt in a park to hit a small ball onto a mini trampoline.
toneOfVoice: Shouting 'bro!', highly athletic, annoying to picnickers.

name: Dive Bar Barkeeper
description: A tattooed bartender serving cheap shots of Mexikaner and insulting regulars.
toneOfVoice: Sarcastic, pouring shots, wiping a sticky counter.

name: Mexikaner Shot
description: A dangerously spicy, incredibly cheap tomato-based alcohol shot.
toneOfVoice: Spicy, cheap, causing immediate heartburn.

name: U-Bahn Preacher
description: Someone loudly predicting the end of the world while everyone ignores them and looks at their phones.
toneOfVoice: Shouting apocalyptic warnings, holding a pamphlet.

name: Person Who Lost Their Keys
description: Someone posting frantically in a Facebook group about losing keys somewhere between Kreuzberg and Neukölln.
toneOfVoice: Desperate, offering a small reward, locked out.

name: Tech Meetup Freeloader
description: Someone who only attends networking events to eat the free pizza and drink free beer.
toneOfVoice: Mouth full of pizza, pretending to care about software.

name: Nostalgic Local
description: Someone who complains that Berlin was only good in 1998 and everything is ruined now.
toneOfVoice: Bitter, saying 'früher war alles besser', sighing.

name: Loud American Tourist
description: Someone speaking at 150 decibels in a quiet cafe asking where the Berlin Wall is.
toneOfVoice: Booming, enthusiastic, wildly mispronouncing German words.

name: Bio-Market Snob
description: A shopper who inspects a single tomato for five minutes before paying 4 euros for it.
toneOfVoice: Judging conventionally grown fruit, carrying a jute bag.

name: Rainy Smoker
description: Someone stubbornly smoking a hand-rolled cigarette while getting drenched at a bus stop.
toneOfVoice: Shivering, protecting the ember, deeply addicted.

name: Local Podcast Host
description: Two guys with microphones discussing how crazy the club scene is for three hours.
toneOfVoice: Rambling, using vocal fry, plugging their Patreon.

name: Sunglasses Hustler
description: A guy approaching you at a cafe table with a board full of cheap knockoff sunglasses.
toneOfVoice: Persistent, whispering 'good price', easily scared off.

name: Spielothek Lurker
description: A person sitting inside a depressing, neon-lit slot machine parlor at noon on a Tuesday.
toneOfVoice: Silent, smoking, pressing buttons hypnotically.

name: Expat Improv Actor
description: Someone begging you to come to their basement English comedy show.
toneOfVoice: Overly expressive, desperate for an audience, asking for suggestions.

name: Pretentious Gallery Owner
description: A person standing in an empty white room with one brick on the floor, calling it genius.
toneOfVoice: Whispering, discussing spatial dynamics, wearing weird glasses.

name: Mauerpark Dog
description: A dog running off-leash trying to steal a sausage from a disposable grill.
toneOfVoice: Panting, opportunistic, ignoring its owner.

name: Einweggrill
description: A cheap aluminum tray pumping thick, toxic smoke directly into people's faces at the park.
toneOfVoice: Smoking heavily, barely cooking the meat.

name: Stick-and-Poke Artist
description: Someone doing slightly wobbly tattoos in their kitchen for 20 euros.
toneOfVoice: Assuring you it's safe, wiping ink, playing lo-fi beats.

name: Mullet Enthusiast
description: Someone unironically rocking a terrible 80s haircut and tiny sunglasses.
toneOfVoice: Edgy, saying 'it's fashion', chewing gum.

name: Charlottenburg Retiree
description: An elegant older person in a fur coat eating cake at a traditional cafe.
toneOfVoice: Polite, chewing delicately, appalled by the rest of the city.

name: Mitte Tech CEO
description: A guy who rides an expensive e-bike to his office to manage a team of underpaid interns.
toneOfVoice: Talking about scale, using business jargon, rushing.

name: Spandau Local
description: Someone who lives so far west they basically consider themselves a different city.
toneOfVoice: Defensive about Spandau, rarely comes to the center.

name: Stressed HU Student
description: A university student hoarding books in the Grimm Zentrum library and crying.
toneOfVoice: Whispering, highly stressed, drinking terrible coffee.

name: May Day Protester
description: Someone holding a cardboard sign and yelling through a megaphone about housing prices.
toneOfVoice: Chanting loudly, angry, organizing marches.

name: Bridge Rave Organizer
description: A guy setting up a massive sound system under an overpass at 3 AM on a Wednesday.
toneOfVoice: Testing the bass, telling people to keep it cool.

name: Freiluftkino Fan
description: Someone shivering under a blanket trying to watch a French indie film in the rain.
toneOfVoice: Pretending not to be cold, shushing people.

name: German Refuser
description: A local who insists on speaking German to an expat who is struggling to practice.
toneOfVoice: Speaking perfect English out of pity, shutting down the German attempt.

name: Zero-Waste Shopper
description: Someone dropping their glass jars on the floor trying to fill them with loose lentils.
toneOfVoice: Apologizing, sweeping up lentils, heavily eco-conscious.

name: Alexanderplatz Raccoon
description: A shockingly fat raccoon stuck inside a public trash can eating discarded Döner.
toneOfVoice: Hissing, eating aggressively, stuck.

name: Closing S-Bahn Doors
description: Mechanical doors that beep violently and crush anyone trying to squeeze in late.
toneOfVoice: Beeping loudly, slamming shut without mercy.

name: Zu Verschenken Mattress
description: A disgusting, rain-soaked mattress left on the sidewalk with a 'Free' sign.
toneOfVoice: Soggy, unwanted, slowly rotting.

name: Fernsehturm
description: The giant disco ball in the sky that watches over everyone's bad decisions.
toneOfVoice: Looming, spinning slowly, iconic.

name: BVG Voice
description: The recorded voice telling you 'Einsteigen bitte' before ruining your commute.
toneOfVoice: Polite, robotic, announcing train cancellations.

name: Currywurst Sauce Stain
description: A bright red smear of ketchup and curry powder ruining a white t-shirt forever.
toneOfVoice: Staining deeply, smelling like spices.

name: Berlin Winter Wind
description: A freezing gust of air that blows an umbrella inside out and breaks your spirit.
toneOfVoice: Howling, freezing, deeply cynical.

name: Putzplan
description: A highly complex, color-coded cleaning chart that nobody actually follows.
toneOfVoice: Passive-aggressive, ignored, hanging on the fridge.
